area.value: one Medium or smaller object or creature/level, no two of which can be more than 20 ft. apart

description.value: The affected creatures or objects become incredibly buoyant. The affected creatures (including gear and carried objects up to each creatureâs maximum load) and objects naturally float on any water at least 1 foot deep. An affected creature that deliberately tries to submerge must succeed at a DC 20 Swim check every round to stay underwater. The spell ends if the creature or object spends at least 1 round on dry land.
